title: Ravensburger Batman Batwheels Jigsaw Puzzles for Kids Age 3 Years Up - 4 in a Box (12, 16, 20, 24 Pieces) - Educational Toys and Games for Children
features: BATMAN TOYS - Get ready to roll with the Batwheels in these 4 bright and colourful puzzles!
PLAYFUL DEVELOPMENT - Perfect toys for your child. Puzzles for kids of every age help support a child’s development as they play, building skills such as concentration and creativity.

PREMIUM QUALITY - Ravensburger puzzles use an exclusive, extra-thick cardboard combined with fine linen structured paper to create a glare-free puzzle image and give you the best experience possible. Our 4 in a box kids puzzles are crafted with premium quality materials and measure 19 x 14cm when complete. Great puzzles for Children 3 years old and up. Fully complies with all necessary UK and EU testing standards
BESTSELLING PUZZLE BRAND WORLDWIDE - With over 1 billion puzzles sold, Ravensburger make a great birthday gift or Christmas present for boys, girls and kids of all ages.
FSC CERTIFIED - This product is made of FSC-certified and other controlled material. By choosing this product, you are supporting responsible management of the world’s forests.
description: From the manufacturer Softclick Technology Ravensburger puzzles are so precisely created that you can actually hear a soft "click" when a connection is made. A signature experience you only get with our premium puzzles. Ravensburger Puzzles For more than 100 years, Ravensburger have been developing puzzles just how children love them: age-appropriate in motif, number of pieces and size. Excellent build quality with materials sourced from sustainable forests. Educational and fun to learn.
